mapper.select:
select * from `user`
name like concat('%',#{name}, '%')
order by id desc
mapper.update: update `user` set username = #{username},password = #{password}, name = #{name},avatar = #{avatar},phone = #{phone}, email = #{email},role = #{role},account = #{account},payment_password = #{paymentPassword}, real_name_verified = #{realNameVerified},driver_license_verified = #{driverLicenseVerified}, update_time = NOW() where id = #{id}
